species.citation: Merr. & L.M.Perry , Amer. Fern J. 30 (1940) 19 ; Alston, Fl. Males. ser. 2, 1 (1959) 64; Type: Zwickey 776 (GH, holo; MICH, iso), Mindanao: Lanao, vicinity of Olangu, near Momungan, floor of a spring stream, 18-Nov-1938.
species.distribution: Philippines, ?Sulawesi. MINDANAO: Lanao del Norte, Lanao del Sur.
